(7) Punarvasu: Physicians. priests. statisticians. Astrologers,
Teachers, Bankers. Sailors. Midwife, Judge, Traders in Gold
and Silver, Silk and cotton. Grains and Juices etc.
(8) Pushya: Petroleum products. Chemicals. Coal. Landed
property, excavations, traders in oil, underground products,
Chemicals. Gold, Turmeric, Asafetida. Silvet ghee. Rice Sail.
Butter. Banana, Cane and Fruit Juices etc.
(9) Ashlesha: Salesmen. Managing Directors. Agents. Writers,
J oumalists. Nurses. Paints. Auditors. Traders in silver. Mercury,
Emerald, Sugar Candy, Green and Juicy vegetables, Grass
and water Animals.
(10) Magha: Chemical and drug industry. Lawyef'S, imitation
